s: A simple and lightweight application for managing and exploring trails.
d:
Trails Hito can load trails in GPX, TCX and KML formats.
You can load them directly from your phone storage or share them from another application.
This app also displays the user location, either by single location updates or by enabling the
continuous location feature.
No data is stored or sent outside your phone.
This apps does not contain any trails, it is only a viewer for existing trail files.
Low battery consumption.
